overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a character in dark robes and a wide-brimmed hat walking through a fantastical autumn landscape. The character approaches and circles a massive glowing golden tree (Minor Erdtree) under a dramatic purple and red sky, with ancient stone jars and a floating gothic castle visible in the distance.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward the massive glowing golden tree

entered.detail: massive tree with glowing golden foliage dominating the skyline
small trees with orange and yellow autumn leaves
tall green grass covering the ground
dramatic sky with purple clouds and red glowing nebula

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a field of tall grass toward a massive glowing golden tree under a dramatic dusk sky. The landscape features scattered autumn trees and floating embers in the air, creating a mystical atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassland with ancient stone jars and floating castle

events.description: floating gothic castle becomes visible in the distance to the right
large decorated stone jars and a crucified statue come into view

agents.ego_description: circling around the base of the golden tree while heading toward the distant castle

entered.detail: large gothic castle structure floating on clouds in the distance
massive ancient pottery jars with decorative patterns
statue of a figure on a cross or stake

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the golden tree, revealing a magnificent floating castle in the distance. Large ancient stone jars appear on the left while a disturbing crucified statue stands to the right, adding to the surreal landscape.

events.description: terrain becomes rockier with large stone outcrops and ruins appearing ahead

agents.ego_description: walking past the stone jars and ascending a grassy hill toward rocky formations

entered.detail: large boulders and rock formations on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the landscape, passing the ancient jars and moving into rockier terrain. The golden tree falls behind while the floating castle remains visible in the distance, and ancient ruins begin to appear on the horizon.

agents.ego_description: approaching ancient stone ruins and navigating through rocky formations

entered.detail: crumbling stone walls and archways of ancient structures

segments.scene_description: The character approaches ancient stone ruins nestled among rocky outcrops. The golden tree has disappeared behind the terrain, leaving only the dramatic red sky and distant castle as the character navigates through the increasingly rugged landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a mystical autumn landscape that shifts from the glow of a divine tree to the starkness of ancient ruins. It begins with the character walking through tall grass and floating embers toward a massive, glowing golden tree under a dramatic dusk sky. As the character moves past the tree, the view expands to reveal a magnificent floating castle in the distance, flanked by large ancient stone jars and a disturbing crucified statue. The scene then shifts toward rockier terrain as the golden tree recedes behind the landscape, leaving the distant castle visible while ancient ruins emerge on the horizon. Finally, the camera navigates through increasingly rugged outcrops to approach the stone ruins under a deep red sky.
